actions.cloneDescription: Create a copy of "{{name}}" with all its capabilities.
actions.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. Users assigned this role will lose associated capabilities.
actions.restoreAllDefaultsDescription: This will reset all {{count}} default system roles to their original state.
actions.restoreAllDefaultsDetails: What will happen: Modified system roles will be reset (names and capabilities). Deleted system roles will be recreated. Custom roles you've created will be preserved. User assignments will be preserved.
actions.restoreAllDefaultsWarning: ⚠️ Any changes you've made to default roles will be lost
actions.restoreDefaultsWarning: This will reset all capabilities to the system template defaults. Custom changes will be lost.

roles.description: Permission groups assigned to users. Each role grants a specific set of screens and actions. Built-in roles can't be deleted but their permissions can be customized.

form.descriptionCreate: Create a new role by defining its name, description, and capabilities.
form.descriptionEdit: Update role name, description, and capabilities.

restoreAllSummary.userAssignmentsPreserved: All user assignments have been preserved.

itemStatuses.categoryHelper: How this status behaves in workflows and reports.

itemStatuses.isTerminalHelper: Terminal statuses end the work item; no further transitions are allowed.

equipmentCategories.description: Sub-types within an equipment type (e.g. 'Furnace' under HVAC). Used for filtering and reporting. Drag to reorder.
equipmentCategories.empty: No categories yet for this type.
equipmentCategories.noTypesYet: Add at least one Equipment Type before creating categories.
equipmentCategories.title: Equipment Categories

equipmentTypes.description: Top-level equipment classifications (e.g. HVAC, Refrigeration, Plumbing). Categories nest within each type. Drag to reorder.
equipmentTypes.title: Equipment Types

filterSizes.seedCommonHelp: Add the 10 most-common HVAC residential filter sizes. Skips any already in your list.

businessDefaults.description: How operations and money behave by default. Used when nothing more specific is set on a record.
businessDefaults.termsHelper: Pre-filled on new invoices; individual invoices can override.
businessDefaults.timezoneHelper: Used for scheduling, dispatch windows, and timestamps on customer-facing documents.
businessDefaults.title: Business Defaults

companyProfile.description: Your business identity. Name and address appear on customer-facing documents (invoices, quotes, dispatch emails); the logo appears in the app header and email templates.
companyProfile.logoHelperLong: PNG, JPG, or SVG · max 5 MB · square images render best (transparent background recommended)
companyProfile.logoSection: Appears in the app header and email templates
companyProfile.title: Company Profile

notificationTemplates.description: Customize email and SMS notification templates for your organization. Templates use Mustache syntax (e.g. {{customer_name}}) for variable substitution.
notificationTemplates.errorRevert: Failed to revert template to default

modulesFeatures.description: Turn product capabilities on or off for your organization. Some modules are still in development.
modulesFeatures.title: Modules & Features

feature.approvalsDesc: Require manager sign-off on quotes above a threshold.
feature.customerPortalDesc: Let customers view invoices, quotes, and upcoming visits.
feature.emailDesc: Send automated emails (work order confirmations, dispatch updates, receipts).
feature.jobCostingDesc: Track labor and parts cost against revenue per work order.
feature.onlineBookingDesc: Customers can request a visit from a public booking page.
feature.smsDesc: Send text reminders and en-route messages from the tenant phone number.

terminology.description: Customize how entity names appear throughout the app and on customer-facing documents. Leave a field blank to use the default shown in the placeholder.
terminology.title: Terminology

statusWorkflows.description: Define which status transitions are allowed. Only enforced when 'Enforce Workflow' is enabled in Workflow Config.
statusWorkflows.empty: No transition rules defined. Without rules, all transitions are allowed (or all blocked, depending on enforcement).

taxonomy.codeHelper: Stable identifier. UPPERCASE_WITH_UNDERSCORES. Auto-generated from name.
taxonomy.codeImmutable: Code cannot be changed after creation.
taxonomy.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? If it's referenced by existing records it will be marked inactive instead.

divisions.description: Operating units (e.g., HVAC, Electrical, Plumbing) used to organize {{divisions}} and route work.

workOrderTypes.description: Categories that classify {{workOrder}}s (e.g., Service Call, Installation, Maintenance).

workflowConfig.defaultStatusHelper: Starting status applied to newly created work items.
workflowConfig.defaultTypeHelper: Pre-selected on the create work order form.
workflowConfig.description: Tenant-wide rules that govern how work moves through the system.
workflowConfig.descriptionLong: Tenant-wide rules that govern how work moves through the system. Changes here affect every work order — new and existing.
workflowConfig.enforceHelper: When enabled, only transitions defined in Status Workflows are allowed. Recommended for teams with strict QA gates.

tenantSettings.description: Manage company branding, contact information, and business settings
